description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named container-image that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, on merge groups to main, and on a scheduled cron job every 4 hours. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs for the same pull request or branch. For the p4lang/p4c repository, use an ubuntu-latest job to recursively check out the code, determine a Docker image tag based on the branch or tag, set up Docker Buildx, login to DockerHub if not a pull request, and build and push the Docker image to the registry with the determined tag.
